meta.scope: Governed, curated SharePoint connected-source selection for Onyx Spaces
meta.coverage_definition: 100% means every requirement in this scoped PRD maps to at least one tracked local TestSprite command/browser test or explicit static/unit fallback. It is not whole-repository line or branch coverage.

product_overview: Spaces let editors attach already-indexed SharePoint connector scopes as retrieval context. Governance adds an admin-controlled curation and source-visibility layer so users browse intentional tenant/department/site scopes, archive-heavy sources are opt-in, group policies restrict who can browse/select scopes, and retrieval remains Onyx-native with normal ACL filtering.

josh_summary: Use SharePoint/intranet files only; avoid uncontrolled OneDrive/user-drive content.
Allow folder-level or department-site-level selection and automatic background updates from indexed connectors.
Show departments, not hundreds of raw drives, and keep selected folders summarized as folders.
Let admins restrict users/groups to certain intranet departments such as Advisor Services.
Prioritize recall/chat reliability and avoid noisy giant archive/client folders by default.

requirements.title: Admin-governed source scopes
requirements.description: Admins can create governance rows for indexed connector hierarchy nodes, including curation status, explicit PUBLIC/RESTRICTED access mode, tenant/department labels, warnings, size/count metadata, allowed groups, and excluded child scopes.
observable_behaviors: Governance schema exists in Alembic and ORM models.
Connected source scopes distinguish PUBLIC from RESTRICTED.
RESTRICTED with zero groups grants no browse/select access.

requirements.title: Policy-filtered hierarchy browsing
requirements.description: Hierarchy browse/search/document-list endpoints return only scopes visible to the requesting user, keep governed ancestors navigation-only, hide archive/hidden/diagnostic/paused scopes by default, and never rely on frontend hiding as the only enforcement.
observable_behaviors: Unallowed scopes are not returned as visible/selectable.
Source roots are visible for navigation but not selectable when child policies exist.
Paused connector-backed nodes are hidden by default even without curation rows.
Collection routes are not shadowed by /{project_id}.

requirements.title: Governed connected knowledge save path
requirements.description: Space connected-knowledge updates reject documents or hierarchy nodes outside the editor's effective governance and ACL policy while allowing valid public or group-allowed scopes.
observable_behaviors: Group-allowed users can attach allowed scopes.
Denied users cannot attach restricted scopes.
Broad root, mixed-source denied, hidden/archive, and inaccessible document selections are rejected.

requirements.title: Retrieval applies selected descendants minus exclusions with ACLs
requirements.description: Space retrieval uses selected documents and hierarchy scopes, excludes configured child scopes inherited from governed ancestors, and still intersects with normal per-user ACL filters.
observable_behaviors: Selected hierarchy node IDs flow into SearchParams and SearchTool.
Excluded child hierarchy node IDs flow into IndexFilters.
Owner-selected private documents are not retrieved by viewers without ACL access.

requirements.title: Tenant and department-first SharePoint picker UX
requirements.description: The connected-source modal presents SharePoint through backend governance tenant/department/site rows rather than a hard-coded flat source-only entry, supports archive opt-in, and keeps selected folders/sites summarized as folders/sites.
observable_behaviors: SharePoint sidebar rows come from fetchHierarchyNodes governance metadata.
Tenant labels and department labels render in the modal/browser.
Archive scopes are hidden until Show archives is clicked.
Header select-all ignores navigation-only scopes.

requirements.title: Curated Space defaults and templates
requirements.description: Admins can define connected-knowledge presets, users only see presets whose scopes/documents they can access, and Space creation from a preset atomically stores the same references as manual selection.
observable_behaviors: Preset list filters inaccessible attached documents and scopes.
Create Space sends connected_knowledge_preset_id and applies references atomically.
Unavailable preset creation leaves no orphan Space.

requirements.title: Group admin source visibility management
requirements.description: Current Onyx group admin surfaces can assign governed source scopes to groups without changing connector ACL semantics, and removing the last group from a restricted scope does not widen access.
observable_behaviors: Group editor exposes Space Connected Sources as shared resources.
Source-scope sharing updates governance group_ids.
Last group removal preserves RESTRICTED access_type.

requirements.title: Real-user E2E smoke for governed Spaces
requirements.description: A Playwright/TestSprite smoke drives the real Space right-rail connected-source modal, upload tab, save/reload branch when governed SharePoint rows exist, and sharing invite affordance. If local hierarchy is absent, the test records an honest empty-state branch.
observable_behaviors: Authenticated admin user opens a real Space.
Connected sources modal opens from the right rail.
Uploaded files controls remain available and separate.
Governed SharePoint department rows are selected/saved/reloaded when present.
Share dialog invite controls are visible.

test_environment.runner: local testsprite-rs command inventory plus Playwright admin project
